title: Host-Native Operator Publication Workflow Execution
objective: Make the Olares host mirror the default operator surface for bounded git status, staged-diff review, and publication preparation without silently retiring the current transitional publication boundary or changing GitHub canonical status.
execution_summary: Packet 087 adds a dedicated host-native operator publication workflow authority document, shifts the operator runbook and platform README to prefer Olares-hosted staging and staged-diff review, and adds admitted host git helper tasks while preserving the current transitional publication boundary and GitHub-canonical model.
selected_scope_note: This execution updates operator workflow authority and helper surfaces only. It does not retire the parent-root publication boundary, change GitHub canonical status, mutate runtime or services, mutate packages or lockfiles, or mutate the old host clone.
next_packet_candidate: Olares Dev Residency 088 - Packet 087 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
sql_permission_note: This execution packet authorizes no database writes, no source/test runtime mutation, no package or lockfile mutation, no installs, no runtime or service mutation, no AI-services expansion, no remote rewrite, no rollback or force/reset/clean, and no old-clone mutation.
